title: descurainia incisa
intro: Descurainia incisa, also known as prickly bittercress, is a small annual plant native to the western United States, characterized by its small white flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Descurainia incisa include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Descurainia incisa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and its leaves can also be used fresh in salads or as a cooking green.
